<p class="key-answer" data-question="Pegaspargase 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Pegaspargase</strong> 目前有 <strong>35 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Pegaspargase 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Oncaspar is indicated as a component of antineoplastic combination therapy in acute lymphoblastic leukaemia (ALL) in paediatric patients from birth to 18 years, and adult patients.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>acute lymphoblastic leukemia (disease)（100.0%）</li>
<li>leukemia, lymphocytic, susceptibility to（100.0%）</li>
<li>acute lymphoblastic/lymphocytic leukemia（100.0%）</li>
<li>precursor lymphoblastic lymphoma/leukemia（100.0%）</li>
<li>chronic lymphocytic leukemia/small lymphocytic lymphoma with immunoglobulin heavy chain variable-region gene somatic hypermutation（100.0%）</li>
<li>pregerminal center chronic lymphocytic leukemia/small lymphocytic lymphoma（100.0%）</li>
<li>follicular lymphoma（99.9%）</li>
<li>acute lymphoblastic leukemia（99.9%）</li>
<li>precursor T-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia（99.8%）</li>
<li>methylcobalamin deficiency type cblE（99.7%）</li>
<li>lymphoid neoplasm（99.7%）</li>
<li>Hodgkins lymphoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>chronic lymphocytic leukemia/small lymphocytic lymphoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>blast phase chronic myelogenous leukemia, BCR-ABL1 positive（99.6%）</li>
<li>myeloid leukemia（99.6%）</li>
<li>bladder transitional cell carcinoma（99.4%）</li>
<li>Quinquaud's folliculitis decalvans（98.8%）</li>
<li>alopecia mucinosa（98.8%）</li>
<li>telogen effluvium（98.7%）</li>
<li>hereditary hypotrichosis with recurrent skin vesicles（98.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/pegaspargase/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
